## Definition of Done (CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `make check` green (ruff, mypy strict, import-linter, pytest ≥80%)
- [ ] dbt contracts green if data layer touched (`make dbt-test`)
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR (module report / ADR / KPI catalog as applicable)
